problem_id: Two-Way Interoperability between the Single Window System and Department Systems
team_name: SyncBridge — AI-Assisted Two-Way Interoperability Layer for Karnataka's Single Window System.
summary: Design a layer that propagates service requests bi-directionally between Karnataka's Single Window System and department systems using UBID as a common join key.
optimization_claims: No duplicate pushes nor data loss due to retries when needed
